{"id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.49","title":"Recover Rust EDHOC state safety","description":"Prevent OSCORE export before EDHOC completion, zeroize handshake state, and replace unsafe checkpoint SUITES_I parsing with complete bounded CBOR handling.","acceptance_criteria":"Premature export fails; full exchange succeeds; malformed CBOR rejects without overread; secrets zeroize on all paths; tests/feature tree/clippy and three reviews pass.","status":"in_progress","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"Mark Atwood","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-17T19:09:55.600672Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-17T23:39:04.094187Z","started_at":"2026-07-17T23:39:04.094187Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-17T23:44:04.094187Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-17T23:39:04.094187Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.49","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-17T19:09:55.71605Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
new_value: {"notes":"Implemented groundwork on integration/oscore-recovery over daacfc358. Current three-file patch provides complete deterministic SUITES_I parsing with selected-last rules, completion-gated consuming export, dalek zeroize features, stored/raw transient wiping, failed-session poisoning, fallible injected RNG constructors, and std-gated OsRng convenience. Gates pass: edhoc 46 tests, all-features 47 tests, thumbv7em-none-eabi/eabihf checks, library Clippy, feature tree without getrandom for bare edhoc, diff check. Final reviewed hashes: edhoc.rs 92b59e9a12cd6edd026fe19ffcc1ca2e7cb6c9572aa04b221af1bd777b0a317c; Cargo.toml 7e370893713496222a8ef584c262d0e1875b450adae12639584cd044261ec52e; Cargo.lock 517e0f950f271fab12f2e8ceaaaa6c0109478f5fddf5297d0e32205a0df6eabc. Remaining blockers: .49.1 RFC 9528 message wire-format rewrite against RFC 9529; .49.3 third-party HKDF/AES schedule zeroization. OSCORE context lifecycle is separately .48.2. No AWS required."}
